# Build normalization functions
import re

arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
tatweel = '\u0640'
punctuation = re.compile(r'[^\w\s\u0621-\u064A\u0660-\u0669]')  # remove non Arabic letters/digits/underscore/space; but careful \w includes Latin digits/letters

def normalize_ar(text):
    # remove tashkeel (diacritics)
    t = re.sub(arabic_diacritics, '', text)
    # remove tatweel
    t = t.replace(tatweel, '')
    # unify hamza forms: replace 'أ', 'إ', 'آ', 'ٱ' with 'ا' ; also 'ء' maybe keep as 'ء' or remove? We'll map to 'ا' for search
    t = t.replace('آ','ا').replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('ٱ','ا')
    # optionally replace 'ؤ' 'ئ' to 'و' 'ي'? Maybe keep them; we can map them to core letters
    t = t.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    # remove punctuation except Arabic letters and spaces and numbers
    t = re.sub(r'[^\u0621-\u064A0-9\s]', '', t)
    # collapse spaces
    t = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', t).strip()
    # lowercase - not relevant for Arabic
    return t

# normalize target

# compute similarity metrics across hadiths
from difflib import SequenceMatcher
def lcs_length(a,b):
    # compute longest common substring length using dynamic programming
    m = len(a); n = len(b)
    # to save time, if very long, do limited; but DB manageable per doc
    # We'll implement DP optimized for memory O(min(m,n))
    if m==0 or n==0: return 0
    # Ensure b shorter
    if n < m:
        a,b = b,a
        m,n = n,m
    # Now m <= n
    # DP array of length m+1
    prev = [0]*(m+1)
    maxlen = 0
    for j in range(1, n+1):
        cur = [0]*(m+1)
        bj = b[j-1]
        for i in range(1, m+1):
            if a[i-1] == bj:
                cur[i] = prev[i-1] + 1
                if cur[i] > maxlen:
                    maxlen = cur[i]
        prev = cur
    return maxlen

top = []
for item in h:
    raw_matn = item.get('Matn') or item.get('hadithTxt','')
    norm_h = normalize_ar(raw_matn)
    # sequence matcher ratio
    seq_ratio = SequenceMatcher(None, norm_target, norm_h).ratio()
    # lcs ratio
    lcs = lcs_length(norm_target, norm_h)
    lcs_ratio = lcs/len(norm_target) if len(norm_target)>0 else 0
    # token F1
    tokens_h = set(norm_h.split())
    inter = tokens_h & set(target_tokens)
    if len(tokens_h)>0:
        precision = len(inter)/len(tokens_h)
    else:
        precision = 0.0
    recall = len(inter)/len(target_tokens)
    if precision+recall>0:
        f1 = 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall)
    else:
        f1 = 0.0
    score = max(seq_ratio, lcs_ratio, f1)
    top.append((score, seq_ratio, lcs_ratio, f1, item))
# sort top by score desc
top_sorted = sorted(top, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
top_sorted[:10]

# show top 30 candidate hadiths by score
for score, seq_ratio, lcs_ratio, f1, item in top_sorted[:30]:
